title: Itertools, Infinite Streams, and Bounded Pipelines · Composition Studio
summary: Create schedule combinations and rolling windows without materializing an unbounded search space. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a lazy scheduling and windowing toolkit while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine chain, repeat, cycle, count, and islice with explicit termination.
Sort or otherwise establish adjacency before using groupby for complete groups.
Estimate product, permutation, and combination growth before enumeration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')
